violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food prepared and packaged by a processing plant was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days after original package was opened. The containers of pre-made salad were not dated properly according to their original container.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of vacuum sealing raw meats.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. The stove in the back prep area that is used to cook raw meats does not have a hood system over it.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The shelving in the walk-in cooler need to be cleaned thoroughly.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Box of single use items being stored on the floor in the dry storage.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walls in the walk-in coolers need to be cleaned.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
